content: The little old man wanted to pull Pinocchio's ears. Think how he felt when, upon searching for them, he discovered that he had forgotten to make them!
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Hybrid (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Il piccolo vecchietto volle tirare le orecchie di Pinocchio. Pensate a come si sentì quando, alla ricerca di esse, scopr
